signals.headline: Bitcoin Rebounds Above $70K on Easing U
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Rebounds Above $70K on Easing U.S.-Iran Tensions and Trump Negotiation Signals | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin traded at $74,535, up 5.34% in 24 hours and 3.7% weekly, driven by de-escalation in U.S.-Iran standoff including Strait of Hormuz developments and President Trump's comments on potential negotiations, easing oil supply fears and liquidating $400-500M in shorts.[1]  
Polymarket

signals.headline: South Korea Inflation Holds at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Inflation Holds at 2.0% in February 2026, Unchanged from January and Below Expectations of 2.1% | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

signals.headline: Mavericks Rookie Cooper Flagg Scores 51 Points, Becomes First Teen in NBA History to Reach 50+ | NO | HIGH confidence**
